# Luxe Shutters

> Premium shutters, blinds, curtains, zipscreens, and awnings — custom-made and professionally installed in Temora and the Riverina region, NSW, Australia.

Luxe Shutters is a family-owned window furnishings business co-founded by Chris & Amber Hanlon and Campbell & Claire Maxwell. We specialise in custom-made shutters, blinds, curtains, outdoor screens, and security roller shutters installed across the Riverina and regional New South Wales. All consultations and quotes are free in-home and no-obligation.

## Contact

- Phone: 1800-465-893
- Email: admin@luxeshutters.com.au
- Address: 185 Hoskins St, Temora, NSW 2666, Australia
- Hours: Monday to Friday, 9:00 am – 5:00 pm AEST
- Customer rating: 5.0 / 5 from 16 verified reviews
- Website: https://luxeshutters.com.au

## Services

- [Plantation Shutters](https://luxeshutters.com.au/services#shutters): Custom timber, PVC, and aluminium shutters with superior light control and insulation.
- [Blinds](https://luxeshutters.com.au/services#blinds): Roller, venetian, and vertical blinds — motorised and smart-home compatible options available.
- [Curtains](https://luxeshutters.com.au/services#curtains): Sheer voiles to heavy block-out drapes with S-fold, pinch pleat, and eyelet heading styles.
- [Zipscreens](https://luxeshutters.com.au/services#zipscreens): Wind-rated outdoor screens with UV protection up to 99%.
- [Awnings](https://luxeshutters.com.au/services#awnings): Retractable and fixed awnings with weather-resistant fabrics.
- [Security Roller Shutters](https://luxeshutters.com.au/services#security-roller-shutters): Insurance-approved security with thermal and noise insulation.

## Service Areas

- [Temora](https://luxeshutters.com.au/temora) — home base, same-day consultations available
- [Wagga Wagga](https://luxeshutters.com.au/wagga-wagga) — 1 hour from Temora
- [Young](https://luxeshutters.com.au/young) — 1 hour from Temora
- [Cootamundra](https://luxeshutters.com.au/cootamundra) — 30 minutes from Temora
- [West Wyalong](https://luxeshutters.com.au/west-wyalong) — 45 minutes from Temora
- [Junee](https://luxeshutters.com.au/junee) — 40 minutes from Temora
- [Griffith](https://luxeshutters.com.au/griffith) — 2 hours from Temora
- [Cowra](https://luxeshutters.com.au/cowra) — 1.5 hours from Temora
